tech_news.title: Marathon Budget Reportedly Revealed - IGN
tech_news.description: A new report has claimed Marathon’s budget is over $200 million, and while player numbers have fallen significantly since launch, Bungie’s extraction shooter is allegedly not facing an imminent shutdown.
